rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY MA ET AL VS. PATRICK FOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order As To Defendant Np Sand And Sea Partners, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY MA, RYAN GIN, MICHAEL LUU Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order As To Defendant Np Sand And Sea Partners, Llc is GRANTED as to the Attachment and DENIED as to the Temporary Protective Order.
